TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Heng-li.Fu-te' šļ®Śą©¬∑Á¶ŹÁČĻ == Heng-li.Fu-te', misangaay tu kadideng atu ci-ye-cia nu Amilika, caysiw seplu mihcaan patideng tu Fu-te' kadidengan. Heng-li.Fu-te' u kanatal sayaway pacumud tu telay nu cacukaymasan i kakulian sa yadah ku nilacul nu satabakiay a nikasilahecian. ci Heng-li.Fu-te' caay caay kaw kadideng u patelayay a sitangahay a tademaw, nika cinida i Amilika tatenga makaala namin ku payluma'luma' a tademawan. mahiniay a nika tahekalan tu kadidengan mala katuuday a tuudan, sakay nikasilahecian, misuayaw tu aydaay a siakayan atu Amilika nu lalangawan tabaki ku nipilalidan. . Heng-li.Fu-te' pacumuden nida ku T sananay a kadidengan, miladay tu kadidengan atu Amilika a kakulian. Heng-li.Fu-te' u Fu-ta' kusi a tawki, dayhan kapah ku nipacakayan tu T a kadidengan, ci nida malakitakiday nu kalimucisan nai' ku caayan ka tineng tina tademawan, amica ku nikahida, caay pilihida tu tawan patay han ku udip micunus tu kalisiw, micubelis aca ci nida, pataynien nida ku Fu-ta' a waywayan, yadah ku nipisangaan tu yasuyay a kadidengan, pacumudan nida tu sapisangaw tu sakasilahecian a didatengan, uyni tu sapisangan tu kadideng nu sakalihalay, taneng mawada' ku kalisiw, kya hucunu a tademaw makaala namin a micakay. šļ®Śą©¬∑Á¶ŹÁČĻŚľēťÄ≤šļÜÁ¶ŹÁČĻTŚěčŤĽä, T . kapah ku lipida tu sakaykulian, Heng-li.Fu-te' i batad ku milawnida, saan micakayay u sakakapah a tatanektekan. Heng-li.Fu-te' u sapiyasuyaw acaan, sisa yadah ku gigicu atu sapisiwbay a nikasabaluhayan, pasutaneng i Pai-min hatidaay nu niyadu'an atu enemay a tabakiay nu milabuay nipisiwbayan. ci Heng-li.Fu-te' hatidaay tu nu nikasiidaan nida sipabeli namin i cci-cin-hua, nina ci-cin-hua patudu i sakaykiwyikuan atu kesye pikinkiwan. . Heng-li.Fu-te itida i sakacacay nu kalepacawan a sakacacay nu mihcaan u sakalihalay nu cuyian a wayway nida matineng namin ku tademaw, nika cinida idaw ku sapihantayan tu Yu-tay cuyi a cudadan "kantal a Yu-tay tademaw." ". yu mahidaśó©śúü Fu-te a babalaki nida ci Wi-len atu Ma-li. Fu-te' u namaka Ay-e-lan-ke-ke' niyadu' a mabulaway nu tademaw, tada niyadu' nida u Ing-ke-lan-sa-muo-say-te' niyaduan, pilecuhan ni Hu-te' i caywal nemlu mihcaan pitu bulad lusepdemiad, pilecuhan itida i nikaidawan, i Wi-n-sen-ke-lin-hu-e-de niyadu'an nu umaumahan, u sakakaay ci nida nu enemay a wawaan. manamuh ci nida misalama tu kikaykikayan. caytu mihcaan yadah ku nipalawpesan nida tu demiadan patideng tu nu udiptu a sakaykikaykikayan a kitidaan, caylim mihcan masngan nida ku cacaya a nai-zan-ci. . caywal picnem mihcaan mapatay cina nida, tabaki ku lalum nida. ci ama nida ku mangalay midayday tu kawaw nida, nika ci Hen-li nai' ku namuh nida tu sakayliwmahan, tadikud ku nidatengan nida sakamusa "nai' ku namunamuhaca nu maku sakay umahan, uyda a cacay kanamuhan naku tu nikaini henay nina aku i umahan. caywal picsiw mihcaan miliyas ci nida tu niyadu' taydan nida i Di-te'-li maladisi nu kikayan, matineng satu micumud ci nida i Si-u misadingkiay a kusian. caywal walwal mihcan mikikun ci nida. 1876 . caywal walwal mihcaan, tulim mihcaan a Hu-te' 1888ŚĻī,25ś≠≤ÁöĄÁ¶ŹÁČĻ caywal siwcay mihcaan ci Fu-te' malaAy-di-sen patakelalay a kusi mikuli. i caywal siwlu mihcaan macakat ci nida malasakakaay, idaw ku lawad nida atu kalisiw paculil tu nida tu sakay Nai-zan-ci a nipikinkiwan. caywal siwnem mihcaan misangan ci nida tu sayaway a kadidengan, pangangan han nida "Hu-te' Quadricycle" dayhan ci nida atu sitangaah a tademaw miliyas tina Ay-di-se a kusian, mapulung ku nu heni i tida i caywal siwsiw mihcaan walu bulad lima demiad patideng tu Di-te'li kadideng kuse. nika ninakuse nikalahecian nuheni tu kadidengan caay ka kapah, talakaw ku aca, caay ka hida u Fu-te', nikudan sa itida i caysiw sepcay mihcaan cacay bulad mihedek. u kadideng nida atu kadideng nutaw pasasetseten anu nima ku kapahay sa. sakatusa a kuse nida, Hen-li. Fu-te' kusi a tadakadidengan u sapisetset a kadidengan ku nida, caysiw sepcay mihcaan caysep bulad caysep dimiad ci nida tu ku paculilay tu kadideng nida ci nida tu ku kaci. nika caay ka tenes miliyas ku patehekalay tu kalisiwan a tademaw ci nidaan, nikudan satu nina kusi pangangan han tu Kay-di-la-ke'. malaladay tu Na'-cuy-tan ŚčĺÁĶźÁīćÁ≤ĻťĽ® sakay ci Hen-li. Fu-te' itida i A-daw-hu. Si-te'-le' milabu tu cence namiedap ci Si-te'-le'. u De-kuo tademaw sakay tusep mihcaan ci Fu-te' napabeli ci Si-te'-le' an tu nipakinkin nida a kalisiw. nika caysiw lulu mihcaan Amilika kuohuy a mikinsa tu tatengan napakinkin tu kalisiw i De-kuo. . sadikuday tu tusaay a mihcaan śúÄŚĺĆŚÖ©ŚĻī hedek sa namalepacaw ci Fu-ta' pihaceng tu ku imelang nida. caysiw siplim mihcaan siwa bulad tucay demiad pabelian nida ku iluc nida ci Heng-li-hu-ta' ese. caysiw sippic mihcaan sepat bulad walu dimiad mapatay ci nida i De-paw, nika udip nida makaala tu walsip mihcaan, tadem han i Di-te'-li a Hu-te' lineman.
S.PHON: == ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ ° ***** == ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ °, misaŇčaaj tu kadid…ôŇč atu ¶i-j…ô- ¶ia nu amir~…ĺika, ¶ajsiw s…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan patid…ôŇč tu fu-t…ô Ē~ ° kadid…ôŇčan. ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ ° u kanatar~…ĺ sajawaj pa ¶umud tu t…ôr~…ĺaj nu ¶a ¶ukajmasan i kakur~…ĺian sa jadańß ku nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu satabakiaj a nikasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian. ¶i ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ ° ¶aaj ¶aaj kaw kadid…ôŇč u pat…ôr~…ĺajaj a sitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw, nika ¶inida i amir~…ĺika tat…ôŇča makaar~…ĺa namin ku pajr~…ĺuma Ē~ °r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a tad…ômawan. mańßiniaj a nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu kadid…ôŇčan mar~…ĺa katuudaj a tuudan, sakaj nikasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian, misuajaw tu ajdaaj a siakajan atu amir~…ĺika nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tabaki ku nipir~…ĺar~…ĺidan. . ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ ° pa ¶umud…ôn nida ku t sananaj a kadid…ôŇčan, mir~…ĺadaj tu kadid…ôŇčan atu amir~…ĺika a kakur~…ĺian. ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ ° u fu-ta Ē~ ° kusi a tawki, dajńßan kapańß ku nipa ¶akajan tu t a kadid…ôŇčan, ¶i nida mar~…ĺakitakidaj nu kar~…ĺimu ¶isan nai Ē~ ° ku ¶aajan ka tin…ôŇč tina tad…ômawan, ami ¶a ku nikańßida, ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßida tu tawan pataj ńßan ku udip mi ¶unus tu kar~…ĺisiw, mi ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis a ¶a ¶i nida, patajni…ôn nida ku fu-ta Ē~ ° a wajwajan, jadańß ku nipisaŇčaan tu jasujaj a kadid…ôŇčan, pa ¶umudan nida tu sapisaŇčaw tu sakasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian a didat…ôŇčan, ujni tu sapisaŇčan tu kadid…ôŇč nu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, tan…ôŇč mawada Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺisiw, kja ńßu ¶unu a tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa namin a mi ¶akaj. **********t**, t . kapańß ku r~…ĺipida tu sakajkur~…ĺian, ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ ° i batad ku mir~…ĺawnida, saan mi ¶akajaj u sakakapańß a tatan…ôkt…ôkan. ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ ° u sapijasujaw a ¶aan, sisa jadańß ku gigi ¶u atu sapisiwbaj a nikasabar~…ĺuńßajan, pasutan…ôŇč i pai-min ńßatidaaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an atu …ôn…ômaj a tabakiaj nu mir~…ĺabuaj nipisiwbajan. ¶i ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ ° ńßatidaaj tu nu nikasiidaan nida sipab…ôr~…ĺi namin i ¶ ¶i- ¶in-ńßua, nina ¶i- ¶in-ńßua patudu i sakajkiwjikuan atu k…ôsj…ô pikinkiwan. . ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô itida i saka ¶a ¶aj nu kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a saka ¶a ¶aj nu mińß ¶aan u sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu ¶ujian a wajwaj nida matin…ôŇč namin ku tad…ômaw, nika ¶inida idaw ku sapińßantajan tu ju-taj ¶uji a ¶udadan "kantar~…ĺ a ju-taj tad…ômaw." ". ju mańßida** fu-t…ô a babar~…ĺaki nida ¶i wi-r~…ĺ…ôn atu ma-r~…ĺi. fu-t…ô Ē~ ° u namaka aj-…ô-r~…ĺan-k…ô-k…ô Ē~ ° nijadu Ē~ ° a mabur~…ĺawaj nu tad…ômaw, tada nijadu Ē~ ° nida u iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan-sa-muo-saj-t…ô Ē~ ° nijaduan, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni ńßu-t…ô Ē~ ° i ¶ajwar~…ĺ n…ômr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan pitu bur~…ĺad r~…ĺus…ôpd…ômiad, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan itida i nikaidawan, i wi-n-s…ôn-k…ô-r~…ĺin-ńßu-…ô-d…ô nijadu Ē~ °an nu umaumańßan, u sakakaaj ¶i nida nu …ôn…ômaj a wawaan. manamuńß ¶i nida misar~…ĺama tu kikajkikajan. ¶ajtu mińß ¶aan jadańß ku nipar~…ĺawp…ôsan nida tu d…ômiadan patid…ôŇč tu nu udiptu a sakajkikajkikajan a kitidaan, ¶ajr~…ĺim mińß ¶an masŇčan nida ku ¶a ¶aja a nai-zan- ¶i. . ¶ajwar~…ĺ pi ¶n…ôm mińß ¶aan mapataj ¶ina nida, tabaki ku r~…ĺar~…ĺum nida. ¶i ama nida ku maŇčar~…ĺaj midajdaj tu kawaw nida, nika ¶i ńß…ôn-r~…ĺi nai Ē~ ° ku namuńß nida tu sakajr~…ĺiwmańßan, tadikud ku nidat…ôŇčan nida sakamusa "nai Ē~ ° ku namunamuńßa ¶a nu maku sakaj umańßan, ujda a ¶a ¶aj kanamuńßan naku tu nikaini ńß…ônaj nina aku i umańßan. ¶ajwar~…ĺ pi ¶siw mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺijas ¶i nida tu nijadu Ē~ ° tajdan nida i di-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺadisi nu kikajan, matin…ôŇč satu mi ¶umud ¶i nida i si-u misadiŇčkiaj a kusian. ¶ajwar~…ĺ war~…ĺwar~…ĺ mińß ¶an mikikun ¶i nida. **** . ¶ajwar~…ĺ war~…ĺwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan, tur~…ĺim mińß ¶aan a ńßu-t…ô Ē~ ° *****,****** ¶ajwar~…ĺ siw ¶aj mińß ¶aan ¶i fu-t…ô Ē~ ° mar~…ĺaaj-di-s…ôn patak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj a kusi mikur~…ĺi. i ¶ajwar~…ĺ siwr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan ma ¶akat ¶i nida mar~…ĺasakakaaj, idaw ku r~…ĺawad nida atu kar~…ĺisiw pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu nida tu sakaj nai-zan- ¶i a nipikinkiwan. ¶ajwar~…ĺ siwn…ôm mińß ¶aan misaŇčan ¶i nida tu sajawaj a kadid…ôŇčan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan nida "ńßu-t…ô Ē~ ° *uadri ¶j ¶r~…ĺ…ô" dajńßan ¶i nida atu sitaŇčaańß a tad…ômaw mir~…ĺijas tina aj-di-s…ô a kusian, mapur~…ĺuŇč ku nu ńß…ôni i tida i ¶ajwar~…ĺ siwsiw mińß ¶aan war~…ĺu bur~…ĺad r~…ĺima d…ômiad patid…ôŇč tu di-t…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺi kadid…ôŇč kus…ô. nika ninakus…ô nikar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian nuńß…ôni tu kadid…ôŇčan ¶aaj ka kapańß, tar~…ĺakaw ku a ¶a, ¶aaj ka ńßida u fu-t…ô Ē~ °, nikudan sa itida i ¶ajsiw s…ôp ¶aj mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bur~…ĺad mińß…ôd…ôk. u kadid…ôŇč nida atu kadid…ôŇč nutaw pasas…ôts…ôt…ôn anu nima ku kapańßaj sa. sakatusa a kus…ô nida, ńß…ôn-r~…ĺi. fu-t…ô Ē~ ° kusi a tadakadid…ôŇčan u sapis…ôts…ôt a kadid…ôŇčan ku nida, ¶ajsiw s…ôp ¶aj mińß ¶aan ¶ajs…ôp bur~…ĺad ¶ajs…ôp dimiad ¶i nida tu ku pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj tu kadid…ôŇč nida ¶i nida tu ku ka ¶i. nika ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs mir~…ĺijas ku pat…ôńß…ôkar~…ĺaj tu kar~…ĺisiwan a tad…ômaw ¶i nidaan, nikudan satu nina kusi paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kaj-di-r~…ĺa-k…ô Ē~ °. mar~…ĺar~…ĺadaj tu na Ē~ °- ¶uj-tan ***** sakaj ¶i ńß…ôn-r~…ĺi. fu-t…ô Ē~ ° itida i a-daw-ńßu. si-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° mir~…ĺabu tu ¶…ôn ¶…ô nami…ôdap ¶i si-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °. u d…ô-kuo tad…ômaw sakaj tus…ôp mińß ¶aan ¶i fu-t…ô Ē~ ° napab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i si-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° an tu nipakinkin nida a kar~…ĺisiw. nika ¶ajsiw r~…ĺur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan amir~…ĺika kuońßuj a mikinsa tu tat…ôŇčan napakinkin tu kar~…ĺisiw i d…ô-kuo. . sadikudaj tu tusaaj a mińß ¶aan **** ńß…ôd…ôk sa namar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ¶i fu-ta Ē~ ° pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nida. ¶ajsiw sipr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan siwa bur~…ĺad tu ¶aj d…ômiad pab…ôr~…ĺian nida ku ir~…ĺu ¶ nida ¶i ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi-ńßu-ta Ē~ ° …ôs…ô. ¶ajsiw sippi ¶ mińß ¶aan s…ôpat bur~…ĺad war~…ĺu dimiad mapataj ¶i nida i d…ô-paw, nika udip nida makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺsip mińß ¶aan, tad…ôm ńßan i di-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi a ńßu-t…ô Ē~ ° r~…ĺin…ôman.
S.FORM: == Heng-li.Fu-te' šļ®Śą©¬∑Á¶ŹÁČĻ == Heng-li.Fu-te', misangaay tu kadideng atu ci-ye-cia nu Amilika, caysiw seplu mihcaan patideng tu Fu-te' kadidengan. Heng-li.Fu-te' u kanatal sayaway pacumud tu telay nu cacukaymasan i kakulian sa yadah ku nilacul nu satabakiay a nikasilahecian. ci Heng-li.Fu-te' caay caay kaw kadideng u patelayay a sitangahay a tademaw, nika cinida i Amilika tatenga makaala namin ku payluma'luma' a tademawan. mahiniay a nika tahekalan tu kadidengan mala katuuday a tuudan, sakay nikasilahecian, misuayaw tu aydaay a siakayan atu Amilika nu lalangawan tabaki ku nipilalidan. . Heng-li.Fu-te' pacumuden nida ku T sananay a kadidengan, miladay tu kadidengan atu Amilika a kakulian. Heng-li.Fu-te' u Fu-ta' kusi a tawki, dayhan kapah ku nipacakayan tu T a kadidengan, ci nida malakitakiday nu kalimucisan nai' ku caayan ka tineng tina tademawan, amica ku nikahida, caay pilihida tu tawan patay han ku udip micunus tu kalisiw, micubelis aca ci nida, pataynien nida ku Fu-ta' a waywayan, yadah ku nipisangaan tu yasuyay a kadidengan, pacumudan nida tu sapisangaw tu sakasilahecian a didatengan, uyni tu sapisangan tu kadideng nu sakalihalay, taneng mawada' ku kalisiw, kya hucunu a tademaw makaala namin a micakay. šļ®Śą©¬∑Á¶ŹÁČĻŚľēťÄ≤šļÜÁ¶ŹÁČĻTŚěčŤĽä, T . kapah ku lipida tu sakaykulian, Heng-li.Fu-te' i batad ku milawnida, saan micakayay u sakakapah a tatanektekan. Heng-li.Fu-te' u sapiyasuyaw acaan, sisa yadah ku gigicu atu sapisiwbay a nikasabaluhayan, pasutaneng i Pai-min hatidaay nu niyadu'an atu enemay a tabakiay nu milabuay nipisiwbayan. ci Heng-li.Fu-te' hatidaay tu nu nikasiidaan nida sipabeli namin i cci-cin-hua, nina ci-cin-hua patudu i sakaykiwyikuan atu kesye pikinkiwan. . Heng-li.Fu-te itida i sakacacay nu kalepacawan a sakacacay nu mihcaan u sakalihalay nu cuyian a wayway nida matineng namin ku tademaw, nika cinida idaw ku sapihantayan tu Yu-tay cuyi a cudadan "kantal a Yu-tay tademaw." ". yu mahidaśó©śúü Fu-te a babalaki nida ci Wi-len atu Ma-li. Fu-te' u namaka Ay-e-lan-ke-ke' niyadu' a mabulaway nu tademaw, tada niyadu' nida u Ing-ke-lan-sa-muo-say-te' niyaduan, pilecuhan ni Hu-te' i caywal nemlu mihcaan pitu bulad lusepdemiad, pilecuhan itida i nikaidawan, i Wi-n-sen-ke-lin-hu-e-de niyadu'an nu umaumahan, u sakakaay ci nida nu enemay a wawaan. manamuh ci nida misalama tu kikaykikayan. caytu mihcaan yadah ku nipalawpesan nida tu demiadan patideng tu nu udiptu a sakaykikaykikayan a kitidaan, caylim mihcan masngan nida ku cacaya a nai-zan-ci. . caywal picnem mihcaan mapatay cina nida, tabaki ku lalum nida. ci ama nida ku mangalay midayday tu kawaw nida, nika ci Hen-li nai' ku namuh nida tu sakayliwmahan, tadikud ku nidatengan nida sakamusa "nai' ku namunamuhaca nu maku sakay umahan, uyda a cacay kanamuhan naku tu nikaini henay nina aku i umahan. caywal picsiw mihcaan miliyas ci nida tu niyadu' taydan nida i Di-te'-li maladisi nu kikayan, matineng satu micumud ci nida i Si-u misadingkiay a kusian. caywal walwal mihcan mikikun ci nida. 1876 . caywal walwal mihcaan, tulim mihcaan a Hu-te' 1888ŚĻī,25ś≠≤ÁöĄÁ¶ŹÁČĻ caywal siwcay mihcaan ci Fu-te' malaAy-di-sen patakelalay a kusi mikuli. i caywal siwlu mihcaan macakat ci nida malasakakaay, idaw ku lawad nida atu kalisiw paculil tu nida tu sakay Nai-zan-ci a nipikinkiwan. caywal siwnem mihcaan misangan ci nida tu sayaway a kadidengan, pangangan han nida "Hu-te' Quadricycle" dayhan ci nida atu sitangaah a tademaw miliyas tina Ay-di-se a kusian, mapulung ku nu heni i tida i caywal siwsiw mihcaan walu bulad lima demiad patideng tu Di-te'li kadideng kuse. nika ninakuse nikalahecian nuheni tu kadidengan caay ka kapah, talakaw ku aca, caay ka hida u Fu-te', nikudan sa itida i caysiw sepcay mihcaan cacay bulad mihedek. u kadideng nida atu kadideng nutaw pasasetseten anu nima ku kapahay sa. sakatusa a kuse nida, Hen-li. Fu-te' kusi a tadakadidengan u sapisetset a kadidengan ku nida, caysiw sepcay mihcaan caysep bulad caysep dimiad ci nida tu ku paculilay tu kadideng nida ci nida tu ku kaci. nika caay ka tenes miliyas ku patehekalay tu kalisiwan a tademaw ci nidaan, nikudan satu nina kusi pangangan han tu Kay-di-la-ke'. malaladay tu Na'-cuy-tan ŚčĺÁĶźÁīćÁ≤ĻťĽ® sakay ci Hen-li. Fu-te' itida i A-daw-hu. Si-te'-le' milabu tu cence namiedap ci Si-te'-le'. u De-kuo tademaw sakay tusep mihcaan ci Fu-te' napabeli ci Si-te'-le' an tu nipakinkin nida a kalisiw. nika caysiw lulu mihcaan Amilika kuohuy a mikinsa tu tatengan napakinkin tu kalisiw i De-kuo. . sadikuday tu tusaay a mihcaan śúÄŚĺĆŚÖ©ŚĻī hedek sa namalepacaw ci Fu-ta' pihaceng tu ku imelang nida. caysiw siplim mihcaan siwa bulad tucay demiad pabelian nida ku iluc nida ci Heng-li-hu-ta' ese. caysiw sippic mihcaan sepat bulad walu dimiad mapatay ci nida i De-paw, nika udip nida makaala tu walsip mihcaan, tadem han i Di-te'-li a Hu-te' lineman.
S.PHON: == ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ ° ***** == ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi.fu-t…ô Ē~ °, misaŇčaaj tu kadid…ôŇč atu ¶i-j…ô- ¶ia nu amir~…ĺika, ¶ajsiw s…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan patid…ôŇč tu fu-t…ô Ē~ ° kadid…ôŇčan.
